title: RPL root in gateway: missing Trickle timer drive and DIO TX integration with L2
description: The gateway_rpl_init calls lichen_rpl_dodag_init_root but does not init or drive lichen_trickle for periodic DIOs as root per RFC 6550 and rpl_trickle.h. No L2 callback for routing TX priority or SCHC rule for RPL. Per spec section on RPL and AGENTS.md phase 4. Discovered-from:project-LICHEN-t4in
